CustomField.description: IF(OR(AND(spot__c ,SalesPeriod__c != ThisPeriod__c + 1) , ISPICKVAL(Phase__c, '撤退')) ,0 ,IF(SalesPeriod__c -ThisPeriod__c = 0 ,RemainingEstimateAmount__c * 0.3 / 0.8 ,if(SalesPeriod__c -ThisPeriod__c = 1 ,(IF (Month(occur_revenu_month__c) < 7 , RemainingEstimateAmount__c * (7- Month(occur_revenu_month__c)) /12 , RemainingEstimateAmount__c * (19- Month(occur_revenu_month__c)) /12) * 0.3 / 0.8) ,0)))
CustomField.label: KPI指標金額（来期）
